---
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
          #title-block-header {
            display: none;
          }
        </style>
title: "Couverture"
title-block-style: none
---


::: {.column-screen}
![](cover.png){style="display: block; margin: 0 auto; max-width: 100%;"}
:::
